goal: Make agents report enough evidence that the user can verify the database was actually used.
when_to_use: Any task that claims to use the local database
steps: Record exactly which local files or API endpoints were read.
List each query and the key record/chunk ids used.
Explain how retrieved knowledge affected concrete design or implementation choices.
List changed files and run commands.
State verification performed and known gaps.
prompt_contract: Do not just say 'used the database'; provide query and chunk evidence.
failure_modes: Claims database usage but no chunks listed

quality.notes: Designed to make database-backed agent work auditable.

retrieval.ai_summary: When an agent uses the local database, final reports must include API/files read, exact queries, chunk ids, how chunks changed the implementation, files changed, verification, and gaps.
